TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cilafinan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 209 buwan, 513 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 268 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 245 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilafinan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cilafinan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cilafinan hya' ga Taitung. tay mkraya' na Cilafinan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Cilafinan hya' ga Sena'. tay mkyahu' na Cilafinan hya' ga Howak. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cilafinan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cilafinan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨila*inan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa taituŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕenaʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa ħowak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨila*inan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨila*inan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cilafinan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 209 buwan, 513 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 268 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 245 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cilafinan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cilafinan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cilafinan hya' ga Taitung. tay mkraya' na Cilafinan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Cilafinan hya' ga Sena'. tay mkyahu' na Cilafinan hya' ga Howak. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cilafinan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cilafinan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨila*inan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa taituŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕenaʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨila*inan ħjaʔ ɣa ħowak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨila*inan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨila*inan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
